resume_text: Senior Backend Engineer with 8 years of experience in enterprise software development. Currently at Enterprise Corp designing and maintaining mission-critical payment processing systems handling $2B+ annually. Deep expertise in Python, Java, PostgreSQL, Kafka, and AWS/GCP. Led a team of 5 engineers to build a new fraud detection pipeline. Previously at FinTech Solutions as a backend engineer. BS and MS in Computer Engineering from Top University. Published 2 papers on distributed systems. Regular conference speaker on system design and scalability.
